description: Curated deterministic emergency keyword rules for MedMitra prototype. These rules are NOT a substitute for clinical triage. review_status must be updated after medical-domain expert review.

rules.message: Seek urgent medical attention immediately. Cardiac emergency signs detected.
rules.source_name: Curated verified emergency rules — cardiac category

rules.message: Immediate support is available. Please contact the local crisis helpline or go to the nearest emergency room.
